title: Malus – Clean Room as a Service
summary:
This article introduces **Malus – Clean Room as a Service**, a company that offers to "liberate" businesses from open-source licensing obligations. The service targets frustrations with attribution requirements, AGPL's copyleft provisions, and general compliance overhead.

The proposed solution is a **"robot-powered clean room recreation"** process. Malus claims its AI systems analyze only public documentation and API specs of a target open-source library, without ever viewing the source code. A separate AI team then independently rewrites a functionally equivalent version from scratch. The company argues this creates legally distinct code, free from the original license's terms.

The output is delivered under the proprietary **MalusCorp-0 License**, which imposes no attribution, sharing, or disclosure requirements, granting the customer full ownership. The process begins by uploading a dependency manifest (like package.json) for a quote, with pricing based on the size of the packages to be "liberated."

The article includes client testimonials praising the service for enabling acquisitions and reducing compliance costs, and an FAQ defends the legality of the clean-room method while dismissing concerns about original developers. The overall tone satirically portrays a corporate mindset seeking to exploit open-source software while avoiding all its associated obligations and ethics.
chinese_title: Malus – 洁净室即服务
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了一家名为**Malus – Clean Room as a Service**的公司，其服务旨在将企业从开源许可义务中“解放”出来。该服务针对的是企业在遵守署名要求、AGPL的Copyleft条款以及一般合规负担方面的困扰。

其提出的解决方案是一个**“机器人驱动的净室重写”**流程。Malus声称其人工智能系统仅分析目标开源库的公开文档和API规范，从不查看源代码。随后，另一支AI团队会独立从头开始重写功能相同的版本。该公司认为，这创造了法律上独立的代码，不受原始许可条款的约束。

最终成果以专有的**MalusCorp-0许可证**提供，该许可证不要求署名、共享或披露，授予客户完全所有权。服务流程始于上传依赖清单（如package.json）以获取报价，价格基于待“解放”的软件包规模。

文章收录了客户好评，称赞该服务助力企业收购并降低了合规成本；常见问题解答部分则为净室方法的合法性辩护，同时淡化了对原始开发者的关切。整体语气以讽刺笔触描绘了一种企业心态：试图利用开源软件，却逃避所有相关义务与道德约束。

title: An old photo of a large BBS
summary:
**Summary of "An old photo of a large BBS"**

The article uses a 1990s-era photograph of a large computer bulletin board system (BBS) as a starting point to explain the scale and operation of such systems before the modern internet. The author clarifies that this is not a typical home BBS but a commercial, multi-line system housed in a data center.

The main focus is on the hardware. The photo shows a massive rack of modems (U.S. Robotics Courier models) connected to a "modem eliminator" or telco board. This device converted the analog phone signals into a digital serial stream, which was then fed into a single powerful server running the BBS software (like Wildcat! or Major BBS). This setup allowed dozens of users to dial in simultaneously on different phone lines, all interacting with the same central system.

The author contrasts this with a common misconception: that a BBS was just a single PC with a modem. Instead, this commercial-grade setup was a precursor to today's internet servers, handling many concurrent users who could chat, play games, and exchange files. The article serves as a technical history lesson, highlighting the infrastructure required for large-scale online communities in the pre-broadband era.
chinese_title: 一张大型BBS的旧照片
chinese_summary:
**《一张大型BBS老照片》摘要**

本文以一张1990年代的大型计算机公告板系统（BBS）照片为切入点，阐释了现代互联网出现之前此类系统的规模和运作方式。作者澄清，这并非典型的家庭BBS，而是一个位于数据中心、商业运营的多线路系统。

文章重点聚焦于硬件。照片展示了一整排庞大的调制解调器（U.S. Robotics Courier型号），它们连接到一个“调制解调器消除器”或电信板卡。该设备将模拟电话信号转换为数字串行流，然后输入一台运行BBS软件（如Wildcat!或Major BBS）的强力服务器。这种配置使得数十名用户可以通过不同的电话线同时拨号接入，并与同一个中央系统互动。

作者将此与一种常见误解进行了对比：即认为BBS不过是一台配有调制解调器的个人电脑。实际上，这种商业级配置是当今互联网服务器的前身，能够支持众多并发用户聊天、游戏和交换文件。本文堪称一堂技术历史课，着重介绍了宽带时代之前大规模在线社区所需的基础设施。

title: Bubble Sorted Amen Break
summary:
"Bubble Sorted Amen Break" is a free, prototype software application created by Vee 🥑. Built with the Godot engine, it is available for HTML5 and Windows platforms.

The core concept is a creative fusion of music and programming: it applies the bubble sort algorithm to audio, specifically to slices of the iconic "Amen Break" drum loop. As the algorithm sorts the audio slices, it generates a unique, evolving musical piece.

The application is offered as a "name your own price" download on itch.io, where it has received positive user ratings. The download includes a 93 MB Windows executable. User comments on the page suggest interest in additional features, such as playing the final sorted samples, and inquire about the availability of the source code.

In summary, it is an experimental digital art tool that visualizes and sonifies a sorting algorithm, turning a computational process into a musical performance.
chinese_title: 气泡排序的阿门鼓点
chinese_summary:
《气泡排序阿门鼓点》是一款由Vee 🥑开发的免费原型软件应用。该应用基于Godot引擎构建，支持HTML5和Windows平台。

其核心概念是音乐与编程的创意融合：它将冒泡排序算法应用于音频处理，具体针对标志性的“阿门鼓点”循环片段进行切片重组。随着算法对音频切片进行排序，会生成一段独特且不断演变的音乐作品。

该应用在itch.io平台上以“自主定价”形式提供下载，并获得了用户积极评价。下载内容包含一个93MB的Windows可执行文件。页面用户评论显示，人们期待更多功能（例如播放最终排序后的音频样本），并询问了源代码的获取方式。

总而言之，这是一款将排序算法可视化与声音化的实验性数字艺术工具，将计算过程转化为音乐表演。

title: Reversing memory loss via gut-brain communication
summary:
A new study in mice reveals a direct link between age-related changes in the gut microbiome and memory decline, which can be reversed by stimulating gut-brain communication.

As mice age, their gut bacteria composition shifts, favoring species like *Parabacteroides goldsteinii*. This change increases levels of certain fatty acid metabolites, which trigger an inflammatory response in gut immune cells. This inflammation impairs signaling along the vagus nerve—a critical communication pathway from the gut to the brain—specifically hindering activity in the hippocampus, the brain's memory center.

The research demonstrated that transferring an "old" microbiome to young mice worsened their memory performance, while old mice raised germ-free did not experience cognitive decline. Strikingly, stimulating the vagus nerve in older mice restored their memory abilities to youthful levels.

The findings suggest that age-related memory loss is not an irreversible, brain-intrinsic process but is actively modulated by signals from the gastrointestinal tract. This opens the possibility for future therapies targeting the gut microbiome or vagus nerve to combat cognitive decline in humans.
chinese_title: 通过肠脑沟通逆转记忆丧失
chinese_summary:
一项在小鼠中进行的新研究揭示了肠道微生物群随年龄变化与记忆力衰退之间的直接联系，这种联系可以通过刺激肠脑交流来逆转。

随着小鼠衰老，其肠道细菌组成发生变化，更倾向于产生如*戈氏副拟杆菌*等菌种。这种变化增加了某些脂肪酸代谢物的水平，从而引发肠道免疫细胞的炎症反应。这种炎症损害了迷走神经的信号传导——这是肠道到大脑的关键通信通路——特别阻碍了海马体（大脑的记忆中枢）的活动。

研究表明，将“老年”微生物群移植到年轻小鼠体内会损害其记忆表现，而在无菌环境中饲养的老年小鼠则未出现认知衰退。引人注目的是，刺激老年小鼠的迷走神经可使其记忆能力恢复到年轻时的水平。

这些发现表明，与年龄相关的记忆力减退并非不可逆转的大脑内在过程，而是受到胃肠道信号的主动调节。这为未来通过靶向肠道微生物群或迷走神经来对抗人类认知衰退的疗法提供了可能性。

title: ATMs didn't kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did
summary:
The article argues that while ATMs did not reduce bank teller employment, the iPhone ultimately did. The common economic parable is that ATMs automated routine tasks but, by lowering branch operating costs, allowed banks to open more branches and shift tellers toward relationship banking and sales, increasing their total numbers for decades.

However, the author notes this trend reversed around 2000, with teller jobs declining sharply. The cause was not task automation but a paradigm shift enabled by the smartphone. The iPhone (and mobile banking) made the core in-branch transactions irrelevant for many customers, collapsing demand for the traditional branch-and-teller model.

The key distinction is between **substitution** (ATMs taking over specific tasks within an existing human-centric system) and **obsolescence** (smartphones creating a new system that bypasses the human role entirely). True, disruptive job loss occurs not when technology performs a human's tasks, but when it makes the entire workflow obsolete.
chinese_title: 自动取款机没有终结银行柜员的职位，但iPhone做到了。
chinese_summary:
文章指出，虽然自动取款机并未减少银行柜员岗位，但iPhone最终做到了这一点。一个经典的经济寓言是：自动取款机自动化了常规操作，但通过降低分行运营成本，使银行得以开设更多分行，并将柜员转向关系维护与销售工作，从而在数十年间增加了柜员总数。

然而作者发现，这一趋势在2000年左右发生逆转，柜员岗位开始急剧减少。原因并非任务自动化，而是智能手机带来的范式变革。iPhone（及移动银行服务）使许多客户不再需要前往分行办理核心业务，导致传统分行与柜员模式的需求急剧萎缩。

关键区别在于**替代**（自动取款机在现有人力主导的系统中接管特定任务）与**淘汰**（智能手机创建了完全绕过人力角色的新系统）。真正颠覆性的岗位流失并非发生在技术替代人类操作时，而是发生在技术使整个工作流程彻底过时之际。

title: Launch HN: IonRouter (YC W26) – High-throughput, low-cost inference
summary:
IonRouter is a high-throughput, low-cost inference platform designed to run multiple AI models efficiently on a single GPU. Its core technology, IonAttention, is a custom inference engine built for NVIDIA Grace Hopper (GH200) GPUs, enabling features like model multiplexing, millisecond-level swapping, and real-time traffic adaptation. The company claims it achieves over twice the throughput of top providers on a single GH200 GPU for models like Qwen2.5-7B.

The service allows users to deploy custom models, fine-tunes, or LoRAs with dedicated GPU streams, offering per-second billing and no cold starts. It is compatible with the OpenAI API format, requiring only a one-line code change to integrate.

Use cases highlighted include robotics perception, multi-stream video analysis, game asset generation, and AI video pipelines. Pricing is per million tokens, with no idle costs, and supports a range of models for language, image, video, and audio tasks.
chinese_title: 发布HN：IonRouter（YC W26）——高吞吐量、低成本推理
chinese_summary:
IonRouter是一个高吞吐、低成本的推理平台，专为在单GPU上高效运行多个AI模型而设计。其核心技术IonAttention是为NVIDIA Grace Hopper（GH200）GPU定制的推理引擎，支持模型多路复用、毫秒级切换和实时流量适配等功能。该公司宣称，在单台GH200 GPU上运行Qwen2.5-7B等模型时，其吞吐量可达顶级供应商的两倍以上。

该服务允许用户通过专用GPU流部署自定义模型、微调模型或LoRA适配器，提供按秒计费且无需冷启动。平台兼容OpenAI API格式，仅需一行代码修改即可集成。

重点应用场景包括机器人感知、多路视频分析、游戏资产生成和AI视频流水线。定价按每百万tokens计算，无闲置成本，并支持涵盖语言、图像、视频及音频任务的多种模型。

title: The Met Releases High-Def 3D Scans of 140 Famous Art Objects
summary:
The Metropolitan Museum of Art has released an online archive of high-definition 3D scans of over 140 significant art objects from its collection. This initiative, developed in partnership with Japan's NHK network, allows unprecedented public access to famous works.

Viewers can interactively zoom in, rotate, and examine detailed 3D models of artifacts ranging from ancient Egyptian sculptures and a 3rd-century Roman sarcophagus to Vincent van Gogh's *Sunflowers* and Japanese folding screens. The models are also compatible with augmented reality on smartphones and VR headsets.

The project aims to serve as a resource for education, research, and public curiosity, offering a closer look than is typically possible in person. While not a substitute for physical presence, the archive provides a novel way to explore global cultural treasures from any angle.
chinese_title: 大都会博物馆发布140件著名艺术品高清3D扫描数据
chinese_summary:
大都会艺术博物馆近日发布了其馆藏中超过140件重要艺术品的在线高清3D扫描档案。这一与日本NHK电视台合作开发的项目，让公众得以前所未有地近距离接触这些著名作品。

观众可以交互式放大、旋转并细察各类文物的精细3D模型，从古埃及雕塑、公元3世纪的罗马石棺，到文森特·梵高的《向日葵》与日本屏风画。这些模型还兼容智能手机的增强现实功能及虚拟现实头戴设备。

该项目旨在为教育、研究和公众探索提供资源，其呈现的细节甚至超越了实地参观的体验。虽然无法替代亲临现场的感受，但该档案库为多角度探索世界文化瑰宝提供了一种全新方式。

title: White House plan to break up iconic U.S. climate lab moves forward
summary:
**Summary of "White House plan to break up iconic U.S. climate lab moves forward"**

The U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) is proceeding with a controversial reorganization plan that would dismantle the Office of Science’s **Biological and Environmental Research (BER) program**. This program is the primary federal sponsor of **climate and environmental science**, funding critical work at national labs, including the iconic **Pacific Northwest National Laboratory (PNNL)**.

The core of the plan involves splitting BER's functions. Its **climate and environmental research** portfolio would be moved to the DOE’s **Earth and Environmental Systems Sciences Division (EESSD)**, which focuses on modeling. Meanwhile, its **biological sciences research** would be transferred to other offices within the Office of Science.

Proponents, including DOE Under Secretary for Science **Geraldine Richmond**, argue the move will reduce administrative overlap, streamline climate modeling efforts under one roof (EESSD), and better align biological research with applications like bioenergy.

However, the plan faces **significant opposition from scientists, lawmakers, and former officials**. Critics warn it will:
*   **Fragment and weaken** the nation's integrated climate research enterprise by separating biological and environmental science.
*   **Disrupt long-term research** and demoralize staff at national labs, particularly PNNL, which could lose its central identity and funding stability.
*   **Prioritize short-term modeling** over the fundamental, curiosity-driven science conducted by BER that underpins future discoveries.
*   Have been pushed forward with **minimal consultation** with the scientific community or Congress.

Despite a request from a bipartisan group of lawmakers to pause the plan, the DOE is moving ahead with the reorganization, marking a major structural shift in how the federal government supports climate science.
chinese_title: 白宫计划解散标志性美国气候实验室的举措取得进展。
chinese_summary:
**《白宫拆分美国标志性气候实验室计划取得进展》摘要**

美国能源部正推进一项颇具争议的重组计划，拟解散其科学办公室下属的**生物与环境研究计划**。该计划是联邦政府资助**气候与环境科学**研究的主要机构，为包括标志性的**太平洋西北国家实验室**在内的国家实验室关键项目提供资金。

该计划的核心是拆分生物与环境研究计划的职能。其**气候与环境研究**部分将转移至能源部专注于模型研究的**地球与环境系统科学部**；而**生物科学研究**则将并入科学办公室的其他部门。

以能源部科学副部长**杰拉尔丁·里士满**为代表的支持者认为，此举将减少行政重叠，将气候建模工作整合至单一部门，并使生物研究更贴合生物能源等应用领域。

然而，该计划正面临**来自科学家、立法者及前官员的强烈反对**。批评者警告称，该计划将：
*   **割裂并削弱**国家综合气候研究体系，破坏生物科学与环境科学的协同；
*   **中断长期研究**，打击国家实验室（尤其是太平洋西北国家实验室）人员的士气，可能导致其核心定位与资金稳定性受损；
*   过于**侧重短期建模**，损害生物与环境研究计划所开展的、支撑未来发现的基础性探索科学研究；
*   在**未充分征询**科学界及国会意见的情况下强行推进。

尽管两党议员团体已要求暂缓该计划，能源部仍继续推进重组，这标志着联邦政府支持气候科学研究的方式将发生重大结构性转变。

title: Show HN: OneCLI – Vault for AI Agents in Rust
summary:
**OneCLI** is an open-source, Rust-based gateway designed to securely manage API credentials for AI agents. Instead of embedding sensitive keys directly into each agent, users store their real credentials once in OneCLI. Agents then make HTTP calls using placeholder keys (e.g., `FAKE_KEY`). The gateway intercepts these requests, matches them to the correct stored credentials based on host and path patterns, and transparently injects the real, decrypted keys into the outbound request. This ensures agents never handle the actual secrets.

Key features include AES-256-GCM encrypted storage (secrets are only decrypted at request time), a Next.js web dashboard for managing agents and permissions, and support for multiple agents with scoped access tokens. It offers both a simple single-user mode for local development and Google OAuth for team use.

The project is structured as a monorepo with a Rust proxy gateway and a Next.js dashboard. It can run with minimal setup using Docker (with an embedded PGlite database) or a custom PostgreSQL instance. The tool aims to centralize credential management, rotation, and audit logging, reducing security risks when AI agents interact with multiple external APIs.
chinese_title: Show HN：OneCLI – 专为Rust AI智能体设计的密钥保险库
chinese_summary:
**OneCLI** 是一个基于 Rust 的开源网关，旨在安全地管理 AI 代理的 API 凭据。用户无需将敏感密钥直接嵌入每个代理，只需在 OneCLI 中存储一次真实凭据。代理随后使用占位符密钥（例如 `FAKE_KEY`）发起 HTTP 调用。网关会拦截这些请求，根据主机和路径模式匹配到正确的存储凭据，并将解密后的真实密钥透明地注入到出站请求中，从而确保代理永远不会接触实际密钥。

核心功能包括 AES-256-GCM 加密存储（密钥仅在请求时解密）、用于管理代理和权限的 Next.js 网页控制台，以及支持多代理的权限范围访问令牌。它提供简单的单用户模式供本地开发使用，也支持 Google OAuth 供团队协作。

该项目采用单体仓库结构，包含 Rust 代理网关和 Next.js 控制台。可通过 Docker（使用嵌入式 PGlite 数据库）或自定义 PostgreSQL 实例快速部署。该工具致力于集中管理凭据、轮换密钥和审计日志，降低 AI 代理与多个外部 API 交互时的安全风险。

title: Show HN: Understudy – Teach a desktop agent by demonstrating a task once
summary:
**Understudy** is a teachable desktop AI agent that learns to perform tasks by watching a user demonstrate them once. It operates across any desktop application, browser, shell, and messaging tool, mimicking human interaction without requiring API integrations.

The system is built on a five-layer progression model, mirroring how a new employee becomes proficient:
1.  **Operate Software Natively:** It can see, click, and type in any macOS app.
2.  **Learn from Demonstrations:** Users record a task; the AI extracts the intent and creates a reusable "skill."
3.  **Crystallized Memory:** It automatically identifies and hardens successful routines from daily use.
4.  **Route Optimization:** It discovers and switches to faster execution methods over time (e.g., using an API instead of GUI clicks).
5.  **Proactive Autonomy:** A future goal where the agent anticipates and acts on needs independently.

Currently, Layers 1 and 2 are fully implemented, allowing users to teach tasks via the `/teach` command. Layers 3 and 4 are partially implemented, enabling pattern recognition and basic route optimization. The tool runs locally, prioritizes user privacy, and is available via npm or source installation, requiring macOS with specific permissions for GUI automation.
chinese_title: 展示HN：替身——通过一次演示教会桌面代理执行任务
chinese_summary:
**替补演员**是一款可教学的桌面AI助手，它通过观看用户演示一次即可学会执行任务。该助手能在任何桌面应用程序、浏览器、命令行及通讯工具中运行，模拟人类交互方式，无需API集成。

该系统基于五层进阶模型构建，模拟新员工逐步精通的过程：
1.  **原生操作软件**：可在任何macOS应用中查看、点击和输入。
2.  **从演示中学习**：用户录制任务后，AI会提取意图并创建可复用的“技能”。
3.  **固化记忆**：自动识别日常使用中的成功操作流程并加以固化。
4.  **路径优化**：随时间推移发现并切换至更快的执行方法（例如用API替代图形界面点击）。
5.  **主动自治**：未来目标，助手能预判需求并自主行动。

目前第1、2层已完全实现，用户可通过`/teach`指令教学任务。第3、4层部分实现，支持模式识别与基础路径优化。该工具在本地运行，注重用户隐私，可通过npm或源码安装，需在具备特定图形界面自动化权限的macOS系统上使用。

title: NaN Is Weird
summary:
This article explores the unusual behavior of `NaN` (Not a Number) in Python, highlighting its counterintuitive properties. The author notes that while `float('nan')` is hashable and can be placed in a set or used as a dictionary key, it violates fundamental expectations of these data structures.

The core issue is that `NaN` is not equal to anything, including itself (`float('nan') == float('nan')` returns `False`). This leads to surprising results: a set created from multiple `NaN`s appears to contain duplicate entries, and a dictionary can store multiple key-value pairs with `NaN` keys, treating each instance as unique. Consequently, you cannot reliably retrieve a value using a new `NaN` instance as a key unless you use the exact same object stored in a variable. This behavior also affects utilities like `collections.Counter`, which will count each `NaN` instance separately.

The article concludes by framing this as a "fun little Python oddity" stemming from the IEEE 754 floating-point standard, rather than a practical feature for deliberate use.
chinese_title: NaN 真奇怪
chinese_summary:
本文探讨了Python中`NaN`（非数字）的异常行为，突显了其反直觉的特性。作者指出，虽然`float('nan')`是可哈希的，能够放入集合或用作字典键，但它违背了这些数据结构的基本预期。

核心问题在于`NaN`不等于任何值，包括其自身（`float('nan') == float('nan')`返回`False`）。这导致了一些令人惊讶的结果：由多个`NaN`创建的集合看似包含重复条目；字典可以存储多个以`NaN`为键的键值对，并将每个实例视为唯一。因此，除非使用存储在变量中的完全相同的对象，否则无法可靠地通过新的`NaN`实例检索对应值。这种行为还会影响`collections.Counter`等工具，它们会将每个`NaN`实例单独计数。

文章最后将这一现象归结为源自IEEE 754浮点数标准的“一个有趣的小小Python怪癖”，而非可供有意使用的实用功能。

title: US banks' exposure to private credit hits $300B (2025)
summary:
This article reports that US banks' lending to private credit providers reached $300 billion by June 2025, as part of a broader $1.2 trillion in loans to non-depository financial institutions (NDFIs). This exposure now represents 10.4% of total US bank lending, a near-tripling from a decade ago.

According to Moody's analysis, this trend reflects banks' strategic shift to diversify income and manage risk by partnering with alternative asset managers. The top lenders are Wells Fargo ($59.7bn), Bank of America ($33.2bn), PNC ($29.5bn), Citigroup ($25.8bn), and JPMorgan Chase ($22.2bn).

Moody's notes the paradox of banks both competing with and financing these non-bank lenders, and warns of potential "asset quality challenges." It cites the bankruptcy of Tricolor Holdings as an example of how such lending can lead to losses, while acknowledging that some failures are due to fraud rather than poor credit performance.

The article underscores the rapid growth of the private credit sector, whose assets under management have tripled in the past decade, far outpacing most other credit forms.
chinese_title: 美国银行对私人信贷的风险敞口达到3000亿美元（2025年）
chinese_summary:
本文报道称，截至2025年6月，美国银行向私人信贷机构提供的贷款已达3000亿美元，这是其向非存款金融机构（NDFIs）发放的1.2万亿美元贷款的一部分。此类风险敞口目前占美国银行贷款总额的10.4%，较十年前增长近两倍。

穆迪分析指出，这一趋势反映了银行通过与另类资产管理公司合作实现收入多元化及管理风险的战略转变。主要贷款方包括富国银行（597亿美元）、美国银行（332亿美元）、PNC银行（295亿美元）、花旗集团（258亿美元）和摩根大通（222亿美元）。

穆迪指出，银行既与这些非银行机构竞争又为其提供资金存在矛盾性，并警告可能出现"资产质量挑战"。报告以Tricolor Holdings破产案为例，说明此类贷款可能导致损失，同时也承认部分违约源于欺诈而非信贷表现不佳。

文章强调私人信贷行业快速增长，其管理资产在过去十年增长两倍，增速远超大多数其他信贷形式。

title: Converge (YC S23) Is Hiring a Founding Platform Engineer (NYC, Onsite)
summary:
Converge (YC S23), a marketing analytics platform for consumer brands, is hiring a Founding Platform Engineer in NYC. The role involves owning and scaling the company's core data infrastructure, which currently handles $4 billion in annual revenue, 20 TB of monthly data ingestion, and processes billions of jobs.

The ideal candidate will have strong coding skills, deep database expertise (OLTP/OLAP), and experience with large-scale, data-heavy systems. They will be hands-on, building services to handle trillions of jobs and optimizing real-time queries. The position is not remote and requires a preference for fast-paced, in-person collaboration over long-term architectural planning.

Compensation includes a $180K-$240K salary, 0.5%-0.85% equity, and comprehensive benefits. The interview process is designed to be completed within two days and includes a technical discussion, culture fit interview, and a paid, on-site "Superday."

Converge has raised $5.7M from investors like Y Combinator and General Catalyst and serves over 200 brands.

理想的候选人应具备扎实的编码能力、深厚的数据库专业知识（OLTP/OLAP），以及大规模、数据密集型系统的经验。他们将亲自动手构建服务，以处理数万亿次任务并优化实时查询。该职位不支持远程工作，且更倾向于快节奏、面对面的协作模式，而非长期架构规划。

薪酬包括18万至24万美元年薪、0.5%-0.85%的股权以及全面的福利待遇。面试流程设计为两天内完成，包括技术讨论、文化匹配面试以及带薪现场“超级日”。

title: Asia rolls out 4-day weeks, WFH to solve fuel crisis caused by Iran war
summary:
In response to a severe fuel crisis triggered by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz due to conflict involving Iran, Asian governments are implementing emergency measures to conserve energy and stabilize markets. The region, heavily reliant on Middle Eastern oil, faces soaring prices and supply disruptions.

Key conservation policies include Thailand mandating work-from-home for civil servants and adjusting office temperatures, while the Philippines and Pakistan are instituting four-day work weeks. Bangladesh and Pakistan have also closed schools early or entirely to reduce fuel consumption. India has prioritized household LPG supplies over commercial users.

Governments are also intervening directly in markets. South Korea plans price caps on petroleum, Japan may tap its strategic oil reserves, and Indonesia has allocated billions in subsidies to keep energy affordable. Thailand is freezing cooking gas prices, and Vietnam is considering cutting fuel import tariffs.

Oil prices have been highly volatile, briefly exceeding $115 per barrel before stabilizing above $90. The International Energy Agency has coordinated a release of 400 million barrels from emergency reserves. Analysts warn the supply disruption is more severe than previous crises, with oil prices potentially reaching $200 per barrel by 2026.
chinese_title: 亚洲推行四天工作周和居家办公，以应对伊朗战争引发的燃料危机。
chinese_summary:
为应对伊朗冲突导致霍尔木兹海峡关闭引发的严重燃料危机，亚洲各国政府正采取紧急措施以节约能源、稳定市场。该地区高度依赖中东石油，目前面临价格飙升和供应中断的困境。

主要节能政策包括泰国强制公务员居家办公并调整办公室温度，菲律宾和巴基斯坦则推行四天工作周。孟加拉国和巴基斯坦已提前或全面关闭学校以减少燃料消耗。印度已优先保障家庭液化石油气供应，而非商业用户。

各国政府也直接干预市场：韩国计划对成品油实施价格上限，日本可能动用战略石油储备，印尼已拨款数十亿美元补贴以维持能源价格稳定。泰国冻结了烹饪用燃气价格，越南正考虑削减燃料进口关税。

油价波动剧烈，曾短暂突破每桶115美元，后稳定在90美元上方。国际能源署已协调释放4亿桶紧急储备油。分析师警告称，此次供应中断比以往危机更为严重，到2026年油价可能触及每桶200美元。

title: WolfIP: Lightweight TCP/IP stack with no dynamic memory allocations
summary:
**WolfIP** is a lightweight, embedded TCP/IP stack designed for resource-constrained systems. Its defining feature is the complete absence of dynamic memory allocation, relying instead on a fixed number of pre-allocated sockets and static buffers.

The stack supports endpoint-only operation (no routing) and a single network interface. It implements a comprehensive set of protocols, including Ethernet, ARP, IPv4, ICMP, UDP, and TCP. The TCP implementation is robust, featuring advanced capabilities like SACK, congestion control, window scaling, and RTT measurement. It also supports application-layer protocols such as DHCP (client), DNS (client), and HTTP/HTTPS (server with TLS via wolfSSL).

A key development tool is its **POSIX shim** (`libwolfip.so`), which allows host applications (like `nc` or `ping`) to be transparently redirected to use the WolfIP stack via a TAP device for functional testing.

The project now includes a dedicated **FreeRTOS port**, which integrates the stack with FreeRTOS using a background polling task and mutex-protected socket wrappers to manage blocking operations.

WolfIP is licensed under the **GPLv3** and is copyrighted by wolfSSL Inc.
chinese_title: WolfIP：无需动态内存分配的轻量级TCP/IP协议栈
chinese_summary:
**WolfIP**是一款轻量级嵌入式TCP/IP协议栈，专为资源受限系统设计。其核心特性是完全不使用动态内存分配，而是依赖固定数量的预分配套接字和静态缓冲区。

该协议栈支持仅端点模式（无路由功能）和单一网络接口。它实现了完整的协议套件，包括以太网、ARP、IPv4、ICMP、UDP和TCP。其TCP实现稳健可靠，具备SACK、拥塞控制、窗口缩放和RTT测量等高级功能。同时支持应用层协议，如DHCP（客户端）、DNS（客户端）以及HTTP/HTTPS（通过wolfSSL实现TLS的服务器端）。

关键开发工具是其**POSIX适配层**（`libwolfip.so`），允许主机应用程序（如`nc`或`ping`）通过TAP设备透明重定向至WolfIP协议栈进行功能测试。

该项目现已包含专用的**FreeRTOS移植版本**，通过后台轮询任务和互斥锁保护的套接字封装器，将协议栈与FreeRTOS集成以管理阻塞操作。

WolfIP采用**GPLv3**开源协议，版权归wolfSSL Inc.所有。

title: Dolphin Progress Release 2603
summary:
This Dolphin Progress Report announces Release 2603, featuring three major advancements. The headline addition is the emulator's first new platform support in 18 years: the Triforce arcade system.

The most significant performance improvement comes from implementing "fastmem" support for page table memory mappings. This optimization dramatically boosts games that use custom memory handlers to access extra RAM (ARAM), most notably making *Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike* fully playable for the first time. While games like *Spider-Man 2* see a minor performance dip, they benefit from smoother gameplay with fewer stutters. *Cars 2* also sees a major performance uplift.

Further targeted optimizations were made for the demanding *Rogue Squadron* games. These include disabling the "Branch Following" feature to reduce severe stutters when changing camera views and optimizing code invalidation. A graphics performance regression related to texture handling was also fixed, improving frame rates.

The report also mentions a long-standing physics bug in *Mario Strikers Charged* was finally resolved through community collaboration.
chinese_title: 海豚进度发布2603版
chinese_summary:
本次海豚模拟器进度报告宣布推出2603版本，包含三项重大进展。最引人注目的是模拟器18年来首次新增平台支持——街机系统Triforce。

最显著的性能提升来自对页表内存映射实现"快速内存"支持。这项优化极大提升了使用自定义内存处理器访问额外RAM（ARAM）的游戏性能，尤其使《星际大战：侠盗中队III》首次实现全程流畅运行。虽然《蜘蛛侠2》等游戏帧率略有下降，但卡顿减少使游戏体验更顺畅。《赛车总动员2》也获得了显著的性能提升。

针对高要求的《侠盗中队》系列游戏进行了专项优化：通过禁用"分支追踪"功能减少切换视角时的严重卡顿，并优化了代码失效处理机制。同时修复了纹理处理相关的图形性能倒退问题，提升了帧率表现。

报告还提及通过社区协作，最终修复了《马里奥激战前锋》中长期存在的物理引擎漏洞。

title: Show HN: Axe – A 12MB binary that replaces your AI framework
summary:
**Axe** is a lightweight, 12MB CLI tool designed to run and manage LLM-powered agents like Unix programs. Instead of a monolithic AI framework, it treats each agent as a small, focused tool defined in a TOML configuration file. Agents can be run from the command line, accept piped input, and be chained together or triggered from cron, git hooks, or CI/CD pipelines.

Key features include:
- **Multi-provider support** for Anthropic, OpenAI, and local Ollama models.
- **Declarative TOML configuration** for version-controlled agent definitions.
- **Sub-agent delegation** with depth limiting and parallel execution.
- **Persistent memory** with LLM-assisted garbage collection.
- **Built-in tools** for file operations and shell commands, sandboxed to the agent’s working directory.
- **Skill system** using reusable `SKILL.md` files for domain-specific instructions.

Axe emphasizes simplicity and composability with existing Unix tooling. It can be installed via Go, run in a hardened Docker container, and outputs structured JSON for scripting. The tool is open-source under Apache 2.0 and focuses on being an executor, not a scheduler, fitting seamlessly into existing workflows.
chinese_title: 展示 HN：Axe——一个12MB的二进制文件，可替代你的AI框架
chinese_summary:
**Axe** 是一款轻量级、仅 12MB 的命令行工具，旨在像运行和管理 Unix 程序一样运行和管理基于大语言模型的智能体。它并非一个庞大的 AI 框架，而是将每个智能体视为一个由 TOML 配置文件定义的小型、专注的工具。智能体可以从命令行运行，接受管道输入，并能串联在一起，或通过 cron、git 钩子或 CI/CD 流水线触发。

主要特性包括：
- **多模型提供商支持**：支持 Anthropic、OpenAI 及本地 Ollama 模型。
- **声明式 TOML 配置**：支持版本控制的智能体定义。
- **子智能体委派**：支持深度限制和并行执行。
- **持久化记忆**：具备大语言模型辅助的垃圾回收机制。
- **内置工具**：提供文件操作和 shell 命令工具，并沙盒化限制在智能体的工作目录内。
- **技能系统**：使用可复用的 `SKILL.md` 文件提供领域特定指令。

Axe 强调与现有 Unix 工具的简洁性和可组合性。它可通过 Go 安装，在强化的 Docker 容器中运行，并输出结构化的 JSON 以便脚本处理。该工具采用 Apache 2.0 开源协议，其定位是执行器而非调度器，旨在无缝融入现有工作流程。

title: Kotlin creator's new language: a formal way to talk to LLMs instead of English
summary:
**Summary:**

CodeSpeak is a new programming language created by Kotlin's founder, designed to use formal specifications ("specs") instead of English to communicate with Large Language Models (LLMs). Its core promise is to shrink codebases by 5-10x by having developers write concise, plain-text specs, which are then automatically transformed into production code by AI.

The language targets teams building complex, long-term systems, not just prototypes. It supports mixed projects where generated and manually written code coexist. Case studies from real open-source projects demonstrate significant reductions in lines of code (LOC) while maintaining or improving test coverage. For example, converting 255 lines of Python code for a video downloader feature resulted in a 38-line spec (a 6.7x reduction) and added 37 passing tests.

The vision is a shift from maintaining verbose code to maintaining compact, human-readable specs, aiming to improve communication and long-term maintainability in software engineering.
chinese_title: Kotlin创造者的新语言：一种与大型语言模型交流的正式方式，替代英语
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**

CodeSpeak是由Kotlin创始人创建的一种新型编程语言，其设计理念是使用形式化规范（“specs”）而非英语来与大型语言模型（LLMs）进行交互。该语言的核心承诺是通过让开发者编写简洁的纯文本规范，再由AI自动将其转化为生产代码，从而将代码库规模缩小5至10倍。

该语言面向构建复杂、长期系统的团队，而不仅仅是原型开发。它支持生成代码与手动编写代码共存的混合项目。来自真实开源项目的案例研究表明，在保持或提高测试覆盖率的同时，代码行数（LOC）显著减少。例如，将一个视频下载器功能的255行Python代码转换为38行规范（减少了6.7倍），并增加了37个通过的测试。

其愿景是从维护冗长的代码转向维护紧凑、人类可读的规范，旨在改善软件工程中的沟通效率和长期可维护性。

title: Show HN: Rudel – Claude Code Session Analytics

Rudel is an analytics tool for Claude Code sessions that provides a dashboard with insights on token usage, session duration, activity patterns, and model usage.

The project is open-source (MIT licensed), with documentation available for local development, contributing, and self-hosting. Security vulnerabilities should be reported via the project's security policy.

title: The Cost of Indirection in Rust
summary:
This article argues that the common fear of performance overhead from extracting code into separate functions in Rust, especially in async contexts, is largely unfounded and counterproductive.

The author explains that while an extra function call technically adds minimal overhead (parameter passing, frame setup), this cost is negligible compared to the actual work (like I/O or allocations) done in typical application logic. Modern compilers often inline small functions automatically, making the assembly output identical. Therefore, the perceived performance penalty usually disappears in optimized release builds.

The real cost, the article contends, is in code quality. Inlining lengthy logic for perceived speed sacrifices readability, maintainability, and testability. It increases cognitive load for developers and future contributors. The advice is to prioritize clean abstractions and well-named functions, which make system behavior easier to understand and modify.

The conclusion is to trust the compiler's optimizer and only consider manual inlining after profiling identifies a specific, measurable bottleneck. Otherwise, engineers should optimize for human comprehension, as the long-term costs of unreadable code far outweigh the nanosecond gains of avoiding a function call.
chinese_title: Rust中间接引用的代价
chinese_summary:
本文认为，在Rust中将代码提取为独立函数（尤其是在异步上下文中）会带来性能开销的普遍担忧，在很大程度上是没有根据且适得其反的。

作者解释道，虽然额外的函数调用在技术上确实会带来微小开销（参数传递、栈帧设置），但与典型应用逻辑中的实际工作（如I/O或内存分配）相比，这种成本可以忽略不计。现代编译器通常会主动内联小型函数，使得汇编输出完全相同。因此，在优化后的发布版本中，这种感知上的性能损失通常会消失。

文章指出，真正的代价在于代码质量。为了追求感知上的速度而内联冗长逻辑，会牺牲代码的可读性、可维护性和可测试性。这不仅增加了开发人员的认知负担，也影响了未来贡献者的理解。建议优先采用清晰的抽象和命名恰当的函数，这能使系统行为更易于理解和修改。

结论是：应当信任编译器的优化器，仅在性能分析发现具体且可测量的瓶颈时，才考虑手动内联。否则，工程师应当优先优化代码的人类可读性，因为难以理解的代码所带来的长期成本，远超过避免函数调用所获得的纳秒级性能收益。

title: Full Spectrum and Infrared Photography
summary:
This article explores the visual effects of full-spectrum and infrared photography using a modified DSLR camera. The author explains that a full-spectrum camera, with its UV/IR-blocking filters removed, captures both visible and near-infrared light, resulting in images with a distinctive pink hue, especially in daylight.

Key observations include how sunlight's infrared component makes foliage appear bright and reflective, while skies look darker due to reduced scattering. This creates dramatic, high-contrast landscapes with crisp shadows. The author contrasts this with visible-light-only shots using a "hot mirror" filter and pure infrared images using an 850nm filter.

The article details how different light sources affect the results: the sun and traditional sources like sodium-vapor and halogen lamps emit strong infrared, creating pink hotspots, whereas modern LEDs emit little to none. It also notes that infrared light focuses differently, sometimes causing blur, and can "see through" atmospheric haze and detect security camera LEDs invisible to the human eye.

In summary, the piece illustrates how full-spectrum and infrared photography reveal a hidden layer of light, transforming familiar scenes—from sunny forests and smoky cityscapes to nighttime streets—into surreal, otherworldly images.
chinese_title: 全光谱与红外摄影
chinese_summary:
本文探讨了使用改装单反相机进行全光谱和红外摄影的视觉效果。作者解释道，全光谱相机移除了紫外线/红外线阻挡滤镜，能够同时捕捉可见光和近红外光，从而产生带有独特粉红色调的照片，尤其在日光下更为明显。

关键观察包括：阳光中的红外成分使树叶显得明亮且反光，而天空因散射减少而显得更暗，从而创造出具有鲜明阴影的戏剧性高对比度景观。作者将此与使用"热镜"滤镜的纯可见光拍摄以及使用850纳米滤镜的纯红外图像进行了对比。

文章详细说明了不同光源如何影响拍摄效果：太阳及钠蒸气灯、卤素灯等传统光源会发射强红外线，形成粉红色光斑；而现代LED灯则几乎不发射红外线。文中还指出，红外光对焦方式不同，有时会导致模糊，并能"穿透"大气雾霾，探测到人眼不可见的监控摄像头LED指示灯。

总之，这篇文章展示了全光谱和红外摄影如何揭示光的隐藏层面，将熟悉的场景——从阳光下的森林、烟雾缭绕的城市景观到夜晚的街道——转化为超现实、宛若异世界的图像。

title: Italian prosecutors seek trial for Amazon, 4 execs in alleged $1.4B tax evasion
summary:
Based on the Reuters article, here is a concise summary:

Italian prosecutors in Milan have formally requested a trial for Amazon and four of its current and former executives over allegations of large-scale tax evasion. The case centers on a claim that Amazon evaded approximately 1.4 billion euros ($1.5 billion) in corporate taxes between 2015 and 2021.

The core accusation is that Amazon funneled over 58 billion euros in revenue from its Italian operations through a Luxembourg-based entity, Amazon Europe Core Sarl. Prosecutors allege this was done to avoid paying the higher corporate tax rates in Italy, thereby gaining an unfair advantage over local competitors. The four individuals named include three Italian managers and a former Luxembourg-based executive.

This legal action follows a multi-year investigation and represents a significant escalation in Italy's efforts to combat aggressive tax planning by multinational tech giants. Amazon has consistently denied any wrongdoing, stating it has always followed all applicable tax laws and that its practices are common among international companies.

The Milan judge now has up to one year to decide whether to accept the prosecutors' request and proceed to a full trial. If convicted, Amazon could face substantial financial penalties, and the executives could potentially face individual sentences.
chinese_title: 意大利检方寻求对亚马逊及四名高管进行审判，涉嫌14亿美元逃税案。
chinese_summary:
根据路透社报道，以下是简要概述：

米兰的意大利检察官已正式要求对亚马逊及其四名现任和前任高管提起诉讼，指控其大规模逃税。案件核心在于亚马逊被控在2015年至2021年间逃避了约14亿欧元（合15亿美元）的企业税。

主要指控是亚马逊通过卢森堡实体Amazon Europe Core Sarl转移了超过580亿欧元的意大利业务收入。检方称此举旨在规避意大利较高的企业税率，从而获得相对于本地竞争对手的不公平优势。被点名的四人包括三名意大利经理和一名前卢森堡高管。

此次法律行动是经过多年调查后采取的，标志着意大利打击跨国科技巨头激进税务筹划的努力显著升级。亚马逊始终否认有任何不当行为，称其一直遵守所有适用税法，且其实践在国际公司中很常见。

米兰法官现有一年时间决定是否接受检方请求并启动全面审判。若被定罪，亚马逊可能面临巨额经济处罚，相关高管也可能被判处个人刑罚。

title: Contextual commits – An open standard for capturing the why in Git history
summary:
This article introduces **Contextual Commits**, an open standard designed to capture the *reasoning* behind code changes directly within Git commit history. The author developed it to solve the problem of "context decay"—where the "why" behind decisions is lost over time—especially when working with AI coding assistants.

The standard builds upon **Conventional Commits**. The commit subject (e.g., `feat(auth): implement Google OAuth`) still states *what* changed. The innovation is in the commit body, which uses a structured list of action lines to document the *why*:

*   **intent:** The goal or user need.
*   **decision:** The chosen solution and its rationale.
*   **rejected:** Alternative options that were considered and discarded.
*   **constraint:** Any limitations or requirements.
*   **learned:** Key insights gained during implementation.

This approach embeds context directly into the Git log, which is append-only and scales naturally with the project. It eliminates the need for separate, often neglected, documentation files and avoids sync or merge conflicts. The author provides a reference implementation as a skill for AI assistants to auto-generate these commits and to search ("recall") past reasoning. The goal is a lightweight, tool-agnostic standard that improves project understanding for both humans and AI.
chinese_title: 情境化提交——一个用于在Git历史中记录“为什么”的开放标准
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了**情境化提交**，这是一种旨在将代码变更背后的*推理过程*直接记录在Git提交历史中的开放标准。作者开发此标准是为了解决“情境衰减”问题——即决策背后的“原因”随时间流逝而丢失——尤其是在使用AI编程助手协作时。

该标准建立在**约定式提交**之上。提交主题（例如`feat(auth): 实现Google OAuth`）仍说明*变更内容*。创新之处在于提交正文部分，它采用结构化的行动条目列表来记录*变更原因*：

*   **意图：** 目标或用户需求。
*   **决策：** 选择的解决方案及其理由。
*   **已否决：** 考虑过但被放弃的替代方案。
*   **约束：** 任何限制或要求。
*   **收获：** 实施过程中获得的关键见解。

这种方法将情境直接嵌入到Git日志中，而Git日志是仅追加且随项目自然扩展的。它消除了对独立且常被忽略的文档文件的需求，并避免了同步或合并冲突。作者提供了一个参考实现，作为AI助手的技能，以自动生成此类提交并搜索（“回忆”）过去的推理过程。其目标是建立一个轻量级、与工具无关的标准，以提升人类和AI对项目的理解。

title: DDR4 Sdram – Initialization, Training and Calibration
summary:
This article explains the four-step process required to initialize and calibrate DDR4 SDRAM before it becomes operational.

1. **Initialization**: After power-up, the memory controller performs a fixed sequence to bring the DRAM out of reset, enable clocks, and load configuration into the Mode Registers.

2. **ZQ Calibration**: This step tunes the internal termination resistors on the data (DQ) pins to a precise 240Ω using an external reference resistor. This compensates for manufacturing and environmental variations to ensure proper signal drive strength and termination.

3. **VrefDQ Calibration**: DDR4 uses a Pseudo Open Drain (POD) interface. This step sets the correct internal voltage reference (VrefDQ) that the DRAM uses to interpret data signals as '0' or '1'.

4. **Read/Write Training**: This critical phase compensates for physical delays on the memory module. Due to "fly-by" routing, each DRAM chip receives signals at slightly different times. The controller runs algorithms (Write Leveling, Read/Write Centering) to align the clock, data, and strobe signals, ensuring data is captured reliably at the center of the timing "eye."

Finally, the article notes that in systems with varying temperature or voltage, **Periodic Calibration** (ZQ and Read Centering) may be required to maintain signal integrity over time. Only after all these steps is the DDR4 memory ready for normal operation.
chinese_title: DDR4 SDRAM – 初始化、训练与校准
chinese_summary:
本文阐述了DDR4 SDRAM在投入运行前所需的四步初始化与校准流程。

1. **初始化**：上电后，内存控制器执行固定序列使DRAM脱离复位状态，启用时钟，并将配置载入模式寄存器。

2. **ZQ校准**：通过外部参考电阻将数据引脚（DQ）的内部终端电阻精确调至240Ω。此步骤可补偿制造与环境差异，确保信号驱动强度与终端匹配的准确性。

3. **VrefDQ校准**：DDR4采用伪开漏（POD）接口。此步骤设定DRAM用于识别数据信号“0”或“1”的内部电压参考基准（VrefDQ）。

4. **读写训练**：此关键阶段用于补偿内存模块的物理延迟。由于“飞越式”布线设计，各DRAM芯片接收信号的时序存在微小差异。控制器通过算法（写入均衡、读写居中调整）对齐时钟、数据与选通信号，确保数据在时序“眼图”中心被可靠捕获。

文末指出，在温度或电压波动的系统中，可能需要**周期性校准**（ZQ校准与读取居中调整）以维持长期信号完整性。唯有完成全部步骤后，DDR4内存方可进入正常运行状态。

title: The Biggest Identity Sandpiles and How to Compute Them
summary:
This article explores methods for efficiently computing the identity element of the Abelian sandpile group on large square grids, culminating in the generation of a massive 16,384×16,384 identity image. The author explains two primary algorithms: the **Difference Method** and the **Iterated Burning Method**.

The **Difference Method** stabilizes a grid filled with sixes, subtracts the result from the original sixes, and stabilizes again. This yields the identity but is computationally slow for large grids. The **Iterated Burning Method** starts with a zero grid and repeatedly adds a "burning configuration" (sand on the edges) followed by stabilization until the configuration stops changing, which indicates the identity.

The core of the article reframes these algorithms using linear algebra. The author introduces the **reduced Laplacian matrix (ΔL)** to model toppling operations. This perspective reveals that recurrent sandpiles correspond to unique lattice points. The identity is the unique recurrent element on the "zero-lattice" generated from an initial state of zero.

By analyzing both methods through this lattice lens, the author shows how they solve two key problems: finding a point on the zero-lattice and then navigating to its unique recurrent element (the identity). This theoretical understanding underpins the efficient computation that enabled the creation of the record-breaking 16,384×16,384 identity sandpile.
chinese_title: 最大的身份沙堆及其计算方法
chinese_summary:
本文探讨了在大型方形网格上高效计算阿贝尔沙堆群单位元的方法，最终生成了规模达16,384×16,384的单位元图像。作者阐释了两种核心算法：**差分法**与**迭代燃烧法**。

**差分法**首先稳定填满数字6的网格，将结果从原始6值网格中减去，再次稳定后即得单位元，但该方法在大型网格上计算效率较低。**迭代燃烧法**从零值网格出发，反复叠加"燃烧构型"（边缘放置沙粒）并进行稳定化操作，直至构型不再变化，此时即获得单位元。

文章核心通过线性代数重构了这些算法。作者引入**简化拉普拉斯矩阵(ΔL)**来模拟沙堆崩塌操作。这一视角揭示了递归沙堆对应着唯一的格点，而单位元正是从零初始状态生成的"零格"上唯一的递归元素。

通过格点理论分析两种方法，作者展示了它们如何解决两个关键问题：首先找到零格上的一个点，然后定位到该格上唯一的递归元素（即单位元）。这一理论理解支撑了高效计算，最终实现了破纪录的16,384×16,384单位元沙堆的生成。

title: Long Overlooked as Crucial to Life, Fungi Start to Get Their Due
summary:
This article highlights the critical yet underappreciated role of fungi in Earth's ecosystems and the growing movement to protect them. Despite being essential to most plant life through symbiotic relationships (like mycorrhizal networks that enhance nutrient and water absorption), fungi are poorly understood, with millions of species still undescribed. Their ecological functions are vast: they break down organic matter, sequester significant amounts of carbon, help plants tolerate stress, and are foundational to medicines, foods, and other products.

However, fungal biodiversity faces threats from climate change and land development, and they are largely overlooked in conservation policy—only two species are listed as endangered in the U.S., a reflection of scant knowledge, not healthy populations. Recent efforts aim to elevate fungi's status. Initiatives like the Society for the Protection of Underground Networks (SPUN) are mapping fungal hotspots, while scientists and advocates are campaigning for formal recognition of fungi alongside plants and animals in global frameworks, as seen in proposals at U.N. biodiversity conferences.

The article concludes that a "fungal awakening" is underway, driven by increased research, prestigious awards for mycologists, and a push to integrate fungal protection into environmental strategies to combat biodiversity loss and climate change.
chinese_title: 长久以来被忽视却对生命至关重要的真菌，终于开始得到应有的重视。
chinese_summary:
本文强调了真菌在地球生态系统中关键但未被充分认识的作用，以及日益兴起的保护真菌运动。尽管真菌通过共生关系（如增强养分和水分吸收的菌根网络）对大多数植物至关重要，但人类对其了解甚少，仍有数百万个物种未被描述。它们的生态功能广泛：分解有机物、封存大量碳、帮助植物耐受压力，并且是药物、食品和其他产品的基础。

然而，真菌生物多样性面临气候变化和土地开发的威胁，且在保护政策中大多被忽视——美国仅将两种真菌列为濒危物种，这反映了认知的匮乏，而非其种群健康。近期的努力旨在提升真菌的地位。例如，“地下网络保护协会”等组织正在绘制真菌热点分布图，而科学家和倡导者则推动在全球框架内正式承认真菌与动植物同等重要，这在联合国生物多样性会议的提案中可见一斑。

文章总结道，在日益增多的研究、真菌学家获得权威奖项的认可、以及将真菌保护纳入应对生物多样性丧失和气候变化的环境战略的推动下，一场“真菌觉醒”正在兴起。

title: Apple's MacBook Neo makes repairs easier and cheaper than other MacBooks
summary:
Apple's new budget-friendly MacBook Neo, starting at $599, is designed to be more repairable than other modern MacBooks. According to Apple's published repair documentation, components like the battery and keyboard are easier and less expensive to replace.

A key improvement is that the keyboard is a separate, modular part, unlike in other MacBooks where it is integrated into the expensive "top case" assembly. This addresses a major past frustration, where fixing a keyboard could cost hundreds of dollars. Apple has also simplified the battery replacement process, which in other models requires removing adhesive.

Out-of-warranty repair costs for the Neo are lower: battery replacement is $149 (vs. $199+ for other models), and screen or enclosure repairs for AppleCare+ subscribers are $49 (vs. $99). While Neo parts aren't yet in Apple's self-service store, these prices indicate a shift toward affordability.

The article suggests this move aligns with Apple's recent efforts to improve repairability in devices like iPhones and could influence future redesigns of higher-end MacBooks.
chinese_title: 苹果MacBook Neo的维修比其他MacBook更便捷、更经济。
chinese_summary:
苹果新款经济型MacBook Neo起售价599美元，其设计相比其他现代MacBook更易于维修。根据苹果发布的维修文档，电池和键盘等组件的更换更简便且成本更低。

一个关键改进在于键盘采用独立的模块化设计，不同于其他MacBook将键盘集成在昂贵的“上盖总成”中的做法。这解决了过去维修键盘可能花费数百美元的核心痛点。苹果还简化了电池更换流程——其他型号需清除粘合剂才能拆卸电池。

Neo的保外维修费用更低：电池更换仅需149美元（其他型号为199美元以上），AppleCare+用户更换屏幕或外壳仅需49美元（其他型号为99美元）。虽然Neo零件尚未登陆苹果自助维修商店，但这些定价显示出苹果正朝着亲民维修的方向转变。

文章指出，此举与苹果近期提升iPhone等设备可维修性的努力一脉相承，并可能影响未来高端MacBook的重新设计。

title: Show HN: Web-based ANSI art viewer
summary:
This is a showcase for "Sure.is," a web-based ANSI art viewer designed to authentically display the text-based artwork popular on BBS systems in the 1990s.

The tool offers extensive customization to replicate the classic viewing experience. Users can adjust the font (9x16 or 8x16), block rendering styles (like canonical, blended, or various dither patterns), and scaling. A key feature is the auto-scroll function, which can simulate different historical modem speeds (from 300 to 14.4k baud) to recreate the feel of downloading art over a slow connection.

The viewer supports individual .ANS and .BIN files, as well as entire art packs in .ZIP format. It includes a gallery of example files from different eras (1990s to 2020s) and allows loading files from local storage, URLs, or the 16colo.rs archive.

Navigation is keyboard-centric (Esc for options, Space to toggle scroll, arrow keys), with touch support for mobile. The interface also provides file metadata, including SAUCE records, which contain original artist and title information.

In summary, this is a feature-rich, browser-based emulator focused on preserving and accurately presenting the aesthetic and nostalgic experience of viewing ANSI art.
chinese_title: 展示 HN：基于网页的 ANSI 艺术查看器
chinese_summary:
这是“Sure.is”的展示平台，一款基于网络的ANSI艺术查看器，旨在原汁原味地呈现1990年代BBS系统中流行的基于文本的艺术作品。

该工具提供丰富的自定义选项以复现经典的浏览体验。用户可以调整字体（9x16或8x16）、块渲染风格（如标准、混合或多种抖动图案）以及缩放比例。其关键功能是自动滚动，可模拟不同的历史调制解调器速度（从300到14.4k波特率），重现通过缓慢连接下载艺术作品的感受。

查看器支持单独的.ANS和.BIN文件，以及.ZIP格式的完整艺术包。它包含来自不同年代（1990年代至2020年代）的示例文件库，并允许从本地存储、URL或16colo.rs档案库加载文件。

导航以键盘操作为主（Esc键打开选项，空格键切换滚动，方向键控制），同时支持移动设备触摸操作。界面还提供文件元数据，包括包含原始作者和标题信息的SAUCE记录。

总之，这是一款功能丰富、基于浏览器的模拟器，专注于保存并准确呈现浏览ANSI艺术的美学与怀旧体验。

title: Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
summary:
Claude can now create interactive charts, diagrams, and visualizations directly within chat conversations. This beta feature, available to all users, allows Claude to build visuals in real-time without code to aid understanding during a discussion.

Unlike permanent "artifacts," these visuals are temporary, appear in-line with the text, and evolve as the conversation progresses. Users can ask Claude to create a visual (e.g., "draw this as a diagram") or it will decide when one is helpful. Once created, visuals can be adjusted or explored in more depth based on user requests.

Examples include an interactive curve to explain compound interest and a clickable periodic table. This capability is part of broader enhancements to Claude's responses, which now include purpose-designed formats for topics like recipes and weather, as well as direct interaction with apps like Figma and Slack.
chinese_title: Claude现在能创建交互式图表、图解和可视化内容。
chinese_summary:
Claude现在可以直接在聊天对话中创建交互式图表、图解和可视化内容。这项面向所有用户的测试版功能，让Claude无需代码即可实时构建视觉元素，帮助讨论过程中的理解。

与永久性的“工件”不同，这些视觉内容是临时的，会随文本内嵌显示，并随着对话推进而动态演变。用户可以主动要求Claude创建可视化内容（例如“把这个画成示意图”），Claude也会在认为有帮助时自动生成。可视化内容创建后，用户可进一步要求调整或深入探索。

具体示例包括解释复利原理的交互式曲线图，以及可点击的周期表。该功能是Claude响应能力全面增强的一部分——当前系统已针对食谱、天气等主题设计了专用呈现格式，并支持与Figma、Slack等应用直接交互。
